mappings.rationaleAI: Social science addresses history of social sciences (A) and 20th-century developments (A.3).
Anthropology addresses its background (B.1) and scope/methods (B.2).
Sociology addresses its background (C.1), methodology (C.2), and status (C.3).
Economics addresses economic theories development (D.1) and scope/methods (D.2).
Microeconomics addresses scope and methods of economics (D.2).
Behavioural economics relates to economic theories development (D.1) and expanding scope (D.2).
Politics addresses history (E.1) and scope of political science (E.2).
Political philosophy relates to history of political science (E.1).

mappings.vsiAuthor: John A. Matthews, David T. Herbert
mappings.rationaleAI: Geography addresses its history (F.1) and scope/methods (F.2).

Psychology addresses its history (G.1), scope (G.2), and special branches (G.3).

Sociolinguistics relates to history (H.1) and scope of linguistics (H.2).
Language processing relates to physiological psychology (G.3) and scope of linguistics (H.2).
Language diversity relates to the scope of linguistics (H.2).
English language history relates to history (H.1) and scope of linguistics (H.2).

mappings.vsiAuthor: Emma Borg and Sarah A. Fisher
